---
id: get-json-auth
title: "Run the JSON authentication endpoint without a JSON body."
description: "The GET form is primarily used for account listing or no-auth probes via the mode query parameter."
sidebar_label: "Run the JSON authentication endpoint without a JSON body."
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/api-reference/management/nauthilus-management-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

  as={"h1"}

  children={"Run the JSON authentication endpoint without a JSON body."}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/auth/json"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>

</MethodEndpoint>



The GET form is primarily used for account listing or no-auth probes via the mode query parameter.
